name: cloudcode
description: Self-hosted, mobile-first web interface for managing local CLI-based coding agents over Tailscale

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend
scripts.install:cli: npm run bundle --workspace=backend && npm install -g ./backend && npm install -g ./packages/cloudcode
scripts.restart: lsof -ti:3000,3333 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true && npm run build && npm start
